pinpoint.baiduchannel.ApiKey.Description: The API key that you received from the Baidu Cloud Push service to communicate with the service.

pinpoint.baiduchannel.ApplicationId.Description: The unique identifier for the Amazon Pinpoint application that you're configuring the Baidu channel for.

pinpoint.baiduchannel.Enabled.Description: Specifies whether to enable the Baidu channel for the application.

pinpoint.baiduchannel.SecretKey.Description: The secret key that you received from the Baidu Cloud Push service to communicate with the service.
